metadata.title:
They Are Still Stubborn and Will
Act Until They Have Their Own
..Way-.-UnCle Sam Holds the Same
Opinion. 80. =,

pages.raw_text:
til such time as they chose to remove
1t do not appeal to the department
at Washington. The absurdity of the
proposition is the only one which ap-
parentiy has made an impression
there as is evidenced by the letter
which has been received by POST
master Harrison, the contents Of
which were transmitted to the board
OF public works.


The government only accepted the
site on the corner of Riverside avenue
and Lincoln street on condition that
street were to be opened on each Of
the four sides. Mr.. Cowles and Mr.
Jones were very anxious to obtain the
building in that end of town and
readily granted the condition that
they dedicate the street and promised
that 1t would be opened whenever re-
quested. This promise they already
have broken and now it remains to
be seen whether for the sake of the
rents from the Powell block they will
continue to hold on until forced by
some legal process to comply with
the promises they so readily made.


Mr.. Jones when seen this after
noon refused to say what would be
done In reference to the demand of
the department Mr.. Cowles could
not be found.
